description: Soft chibi sticker pet based on the reference photo, preserving the human face, a noticeably feminine fuller bust that still stays tasteful at pet size, slightly smoother layered pink hair, white puppy ears, a small white puppy tail, black eyes with slight dark circles, denim pants, square-toe creamy slippers, and a tiny ivory handled cup as a signature prop.

pet_notes: Soft chibi sticker avatar based on the reference person, keep human facial traits, a noticeably feminine fuller bust that still stays tasteful and chibi-scale, black eyes with slight dark circles, white puppy ears, one small white puppy tail, slightly smoother layered pink hair, denim pants, square-toe creamy slippers, a tiny ivory handled cup with no text or logo held close as the signature prop, expressive and lively full-body poses; no red hair, fox tail, or school uniform.
style_notes: Reference-inspired soft chibi sprite: rounder oversized head, shorter body, cleaner bold outline, slightly smoother layered hair, simplified readable expressions, flatter cel shading, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: soft chibi sticker sprite with a clean bold outline, large readable shapes, flatter cel shading, and expressive simplified face.
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
